pr.title: feat: PermitScarcity component for reservation-based parks
pr.body:
The core value prop (permit/reservation scarcity) was described in copy but never visually reinforced. This adds a component that makes scarcity tangible using only publicly verifiable NPS/Recreation.gov facts — no fabricated live numbers.

### Changes

- **New `src/components/PermitScarcity.tsx`** — Renders a scarcity card for lottery/reservation parks only; returns `null` for all other slugs (local hikes, etc.)
  - Internal facts map for `yosemite-valley` and `gran-canon` with mechanism, fact, and window fields
  - TODO comment to migrate to a Supabase `permit_info` jsonb field
  - Design: `bg-secondary/5` card, `AlertTriangle` icon, highlighted window line, NPS footnote
- **Mounted in `DestinationDetail.tsx`** sidebar, directly above the "Reserva Tu Viaje" booking card — contextually reinforces the permit-alert CTA
- **Updated `docs/pending-tasks.md`** changelog

```tsx
// Only renders for parks with permit/lottery systems
<PermitScarcity destinationSlug={slug || ""} />
```

For non-permit destinations the component is a no-op (`null`), zero layout impact.
pr.author: Copilot
